fullText:
🎙️ At Web3 Festival, in a fireside chat between Dr. Xiao Feng & @VitalikButerin , a key topic was the simplification of #Ethereum.

Vitalik breaks “simplification” into two layers:
1️⃣ Making the user experience easier
2️⃣ Making the system itself more simple
